## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Immubit content audit and define a new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Gap:** Immubit's 220 blogs get only \~150 clicks/week, while a client like Tavern gets 1,000 clicks/week from just 60 blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A "Trojan horse" strategy (broad topic → Immubit pitch) failed. It missed user intent, as seen in the "Hydrocrackers" article, which quickly pivots from the topic to an AI pitch.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Create a lean, focused blog by classifying all articles for a specific action: **Rewrite**, **Refresh**, **Merge**, or **Kill**.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build a hyper-focused blog that drives ICP conversion, providing a clear narrative for the client to justify the shift from a high-volume to a high-quality approach.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Underperforming Content Library

  - [**Performance:** 220 articles yield only \~150 clicks/week.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The "Trojan horse" strategy failed.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**Execution:** Articles target broad, top-of-funnel (ToFU) keywords (e.g., "Hydrocrackers") but quickly pivot to an Immubit AI pitch, missing the user's initial intent.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Hydrocrackers" article lacks a basic definition and immediately discusses AI optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Result:** \~96 articles have significant keyword/intent mismatches.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [**Cannibalization:** Multiple articles target the same keyword, diluting authority.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Example:** Two articles on "manufacturing optimization" cover the same topic.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

### The Solution: A Lean, Focused Content Library

  - [**Goal:** Create a lean, hyper-focused blog that drives ICP conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [**Audit Framework:** Classify all articles into one of four action categories:](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**1. Rewrite:** For articles with major intent mismatches.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
          - [**New Approach:** Fully satisfy the ToFU keyword first (e.g., "What is a Hydrocracker?"), then dedicate a small section to Immubit's AI solution.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**2. Refresh:** For high-performing articles that align with intent.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
          - [**Actions:** Add TLDRs, FAQs, and internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**3. Merge:** To consolidate cannibalizing content.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Create one comprehensive article that outranks multiple weaker ones, reflecting top-ranking content that often covers a topic holistically.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**4. Kill:** To remove irrelevant or low-quality articles that don't serve the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Client Narrative:** This framework provides a clear story for the client to explain the shift from a high-volume approach to a high-quality one.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:** Re-classify all articles into the four action categories (Rewrite, Refresh, Merge, Kill).](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Kalil:** Provide a high-level summary of the audit findings and the proposed new blog structure.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**Matthew:** Use the summary to prepare the client for the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7X8GDi5R2Xp2uomy4XTysfoAFxzU5gR2?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
